name: Pacific Ocean
description: Largest and deepest ocean on Earth, covering more than 30% of the planet's surface.

name: Atlantic Ocean
description: Second largest ocean, separating the Americas from Europe and Africa.

name: Indian Ocean
description: Third largest ocean, bounded by Africa, Asia, and Australia, with important monsoon patterns.

name: Southern Ocean
description: Southernmost ocean surrounding Antarctica, recognized as the fifth ocean by the IHO in 2000.

name: Arctic Ocean
description: Smallest and shallowest of the world's five oceans, largely covered by sea ice.

name: Mediterranean Sea
description: Inland sea bordered by Europe, Africa, and Asia, connected to the Atlantic via the Strait of Gibraltar.

name: Caribbean Sea
description: Part of the Atlantic Ocean southeast of the Gulf of Mexico, bordered by the Caribbean islands.

name: South China Sea
description: Marginal sea of the Pacific Ocean, one of the world's most strategically important waterways.

name: Bering Sea
description: Sea between Russia and Alaska, separating Asia from North America.

name: Gulf of Mexico
description: Ocean basin largely enclosed by Mexico, the United States, and Cuba.

name: Sea of Okhotsk
description: Marginal sea of the Pacific Ocean between the Kamchatka Peninsula and the Japanese island of Hokkaido.

name: East China Sea
description: Marginal sea of the Pacific Ocean, bounded by China, Japan, and the Korean Peninsula.

name: Hudson Bay
description: Large body of saltwater in northeastern Canada, nearly landlocked, freezes in winter.

name: Sea of Japan
description: Marginal sea between Japan, Korea, and Russia, also called the East Sea.

name: Andaman Sea
description: Marginal sea of the Indian Ocean to the southeast of the Bay of Bengal.

name: Red Sea
description: Seawater inlet between Africa and the Arabian Peninsula, connected to the Indian Ocean via the Gulf of Aden.

name: Arabian Sea
description: Northwestern part of the Indian Ocean bounded by the Arabian Peninsula, Pakistan, and India.

name: Bay of Bengal
description: Northeastern part of the Indian Ocean, bounded by India, Bangladesh, Myanmar, and the Andaman Islands.

name: Black Sea
description: Inland sea between southeastern Europe and Asia Minor, connected to the Mediterranean via the Bosphorus.

name: Caspian Sea
description: World's largest enclosed inland body of water, bordered by Russia, Kazakhstan, Turkmenistan, Iran, and Azerbaijan.
